title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog - Cancel then Go to Settings
scenario: Notifications toggle in App Settings shows OS settings dialog when notifications were denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, denying the Notifications permission when prompted.
3. Tap the Account icon or menu to access App Settings.
5. Attempt to toggle the Notifications switch to ON.
8. Tap Go to Settings on the dialog.
expected: - Tapping Cancel returns the user to the Notifications tab within the app.\n- Tapping Go to Settings navigates the user to the OS-level Notification settings for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
